---
title: "Base PBI"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-23"
---
```{r}
library(rio)
library(tidyverse)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(fixest)
library(ggplot2)
library(janitor)
library(stringi)
library(stargazer) 
```

```{r}
PBI = import("pbi_peru_2001-2021.xlsx")
```

```{r}
PBI <- PBI %>%
  tidyr::drop_na() #limpiar valores NA
```

```{r}
PBI <- row_to_names(PBI, row_number = 1)
```

```{r}
str(PBI)
```

```{r}
names(PBI) <- names(PBI) %>%
  stri_trans_general("Latin-ASCII") %>%  # elimina tildes
  tolower() %>%                          # minúsculas
  trimws() %>%                           # elimina espacios extremos
  gsub("[^a-z0-9 ]", "", .) %>%          # elimina caracteres especiales
  gsub("\\s+", "_", .)                   # espacios -> _
```

```{r}
PBI$departamentos <- toupper(stri_trans_general(PBI$departamentos, "Latin-ASCII"))
```

```{r}
PBI <- PBI %>%
rename(c("distrito_electoral"="departamentos"))
```

```{r}
PBI_anios <- PBI %>%
 rename_with(
    .fn = ~ paste0("PBI", ., ""),
    .cols = matches("^\\d{4}$")  # selecciona columnas que son años (4 dígitos)
  )
```

```{r}
PBI_anios <- PBI_anios %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -distrito_electoral,
    names_to = c(".value", "anio"),
    names_pattern = "(PBI)(\\d{4})"
  )

PBI_anios
```

```{r}
PBI_anios <- PBI_anios %>%
  tidyr::drop_na() #limpiar valores NA
```

```{r}
PBI_anios <- PBI_anios %>%
  filter(anio == 2001 | anio == 2006 | anio == 2011 | anio == 2016 | anio == 2020 | anio == 2021)

PBI_anios
```

```{r}
#Falta añadir base de datos de población por departamento en los periodos electorales para calcular PBI per cápita
```
